SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
Interface SignalConstants

public interface SignalConstants

SignalConstants supplies the names of the DTMF signals.

These Values are used by SignalGenerator and SignalDetector.

Field Summary
static Value CED_TONE
          Value for CED. 2100Hz tone answer to CNG_TONE.
static Value CNG_TONE
          Value for CNG. 1100Hz tone answered by CED_TONE.
static Value DTMF_0
          Value for DTMF 0
static Value DTMF_1
          Value for DTMF 1
static Value DTMF_2
          Value for DTMF 2
static Value DTMF_3
          Value for DTMF 3

          Value for DTMF 4

          Value for DTMF 5

          Value for DTMF 6

          Value for DTMF 7

          Value for DTMF 8

          Value for DTMF 9

          Value for DTMF A
static Value DTMF_B
          Value for DTMF B
static Value DTMF_C
          Value for DTMF C
static Value DTMF_D
          Value for DTMF D
static Value DTMF_HASH
          Value for DTMF #
static Value DTMF_STAR
          Value for DTMF *
static Value VFU_REQUEST
          Value representing a request for a VideoFastUpdate.

DTMF_STAR

static final Value DTMF_STAR

DTMF_HASH

static final Value DTMF_HASH
Value for DTMF #

CNG_TONE

static final Value CNG_TONE
Value for CNG. 1100Hz tone answered by CED_TONE. Alternating 500ms of 1100Hz and 3 seconds of silence for more than one minute, until the remote fax answers with 2100Hz.

CED_TONE

static final Value CED_TONE
Value for CED. 2100Hz tone answer to CNG_TONE.

VFU_REQUEST

static final Value VFU_REQUEST
Value representing a request for a VideoFastUpdate.
